privileged_info_summary: The legacy-hr-system is a synthetic Maven-based Java project containing four classes that require modernization from Java 8 to Java 17. Employee.java contains three java.util.Date fields (hireDate, dateOfBirth, lastModified). PayrollCalculator.java uses Calendar for date arithmetic in calculateYearsOfService() and calculateAge() methods, and returns raw unparameterized List types in getAnnualBonusHistory() and getLongServiceEmployees(). ReportGenerator.java uses StringBuffer in generateHeadcountReport() and generateSalaryReport() methods, along with SimpleDateFormat for date formatting, and accepts raw List parameters. EmployeeDirectory.java declares raw Map employees and Map departments fields, and uses StringBuffer in searchByName() and generateSummary() methods. The pom.xml specifies maven.compiler.source and maven.compiler.target as 8, requiring update to 17. All verified legacy patterns are present as claimed in the metadata.
